title: Natures Market 1 x BF018 Deluxe Nut Peanut Feeder - Steel
features: 1 x Deluxe Wild Bird Nut Peanut Feeder. Suitable for the garden and patio for all wild birds.
Constructed from durable steel and galvanised mesh.
Designed with a traditional look and feel. Wild Bird Friendly product.
Metal Hanging Hoop, Hang From Trees, Feeding Stands, Etc.
The Shaped Base Allows Feed To Gravitate Towards The Outside Edge - Reduces Wastage
description: Product Description Manufactured from the house of Kingfisher, operates over 1,100 stores and growing omni channel operations across 10 countries in Europe. Following an in-depth review of Kingfisher’s businesses alongside in-depth studies of our customers’ home improvement needs, the leadership team announced the 'one' Kingfisher plan. This plan will leverage the scale of the business by creating a unified company, where customer needs always come first. Safety Warning Avoid using in areas frequented by pets or children. Supervise young children when using the feeder. Do not use with food other than nuts to avoid potential choking hazards. Box Contains 1 x Deluxe Nut Feeder See more
